landingpage.undertitel: Kammerslusen Ribe is a payment system for the ships in Ribe. It is a system that makes it easy for the ships to pay to pass through the lock, and it also makes it easy for the lock to keep track of which ships have paid and which have not.
landingpage.section1Content: Kammerslusen Ribe is a payment system for the ships in Ribe. It is a system that makes it easy for the ships to pay to pass through the lock, and it also makes it easy for the lock to keep track of which ships have paid and which have not.

settings.fullnameDescription: Update your full name, which is displayed on your profile and in your transactions.
settings.emailDescription: Update your email address, which is used to log in to your account and receive important notifications.
settings.deleteAccountDescription: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
settings.registerBoatDescription: Register a new boat so we can keep track of it in our system, and to ensure that you are the right person using the lock.
settings.fullnameUpdatedToast: Your full name has been updated!
settings.emailUpdatedToast: Your email address has been updated!
settings.accountDeletedToast: Your account has been deleted. We hope to see you again one day!
settings.noShipsRegistered: You have no registered ships yet.
settings.shipLimitReached: You have reached the limit of 2 ships.

footer.disclaimer: Disclaimer: This is a school project and not an official product from Ribe Sejlklub. All information and functions are fictional and only for demonstration.

termsofservice.title: Terms of service
termsofservice.introduction: Welcome to Ribe Sejlklub's payment system. By using our services, you agree to comply with these terms of service. Please read these terms carefully, as they contain important information about your rights and obligations.

section1.title: §1 Delivery
section1.content: When you make a purchase through our payment system, we will endeavor to deliver the purchased service as quickly as possible. In most cases, delivery will occur within a few minutes after the purchase. In rare cases, however, delays may occur.

section2.title: §2 Refunds
section2.content: All sales are final, and we offer no refunds. If you have problems with your service, please contact our support team so we can help you.

section3.title: §3 Disclaimer
section3.content: Ribe Sejlklub and its payment system are provided 'as is' without any form of warranty, express or implied. We disclaim any liability for any damages or losses that may arise from the use of our services.

section4.title: §4 GDPR and data protection
section4.content: Ribe Sejlklub undertakes to protect your personal information and comply with applicable data protection legislation, including GDPR. We only collect the necessary information to provide our services and will never share your information with third parties without your consent.

section5.title: §5 Changes to the terms
section5.content: Ribe Sejlklub reserves the right to change these terms of service at any time. Any changes will be published on our website, and it is your responsibility to keep yourself updated on any changes.

section6.title: §6 Contact information
section6.content: If you have questions or concerns regarding these terms of service, please contact us at support@pins.dk.

section7.title: §7 Choice of law and jurisdiction
section7.content: These terms of service are governed by and shall be interpreted in accordance with Danish law. Any dispute arising in connection with these terms shall be brought before the Danish courts.

section8.title: §8 Acceptance of terms
section8.content: By using our payment system, you confirm that you have read, understood and accepted these terms of service. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use our services.

section9.title: §9 School project disclaimer
section9.content: This is a school project and not an official product from Ribe Sejlklub. All information and features are fictional and for demonstration only. By creating an account or using our services, you accept that you do so at your own risk and understand that this project is not intended for commercial use. Ribe Sejlklub and the students behind this project disclaim any liability for any problems that may arise as a result of using this system.

section10.title: §10 Contact information
section10.content: If you have questions or concerns regarding these terms of service, please contact us at support@pins.dk.

section11.title: §11 Cookies and tracking
section11.content: Our website uses cookies to remember your login.

section12.title: §12 Storage of payment information
section12.content: We do not store your payment information, as we use a third-party payment provider to handle all payments. All payment information is processed securely and in accordance with applicable data protection legislation. However, we reserve the right to store certain information about your transactions, such as date, amount, and type of transaction, in order to provide our services and comply with our legal obligations. This information will be stored securely and will not be shared with third parties without your consent, unless it is necessary to comply with the law or protect our rights.

section13.title: §13 Deletion of account and data
section13.content: You can delete your account and all associated data on the website under 'Settings'. When you delete your account, all your personal information and transaction data will be permanently deleted from our system. Note that this action cannot be undone, and you will lose access to all your data and services once your account is deleted. However, we reserve the right to retain certain information for a limited period if it is necessary to comply with our legal obligations or protect our rights. If you have questions about deleting your account or data, please contact us at support@pins.dk.

faq.title: Do you have questions?
faq.undertitle: Here are some of the most common questions we get from our users. If you do not find the answer to your question here, you are welcome to contact us directly.

questions.question: How do I create an account?
questions.answer: You can create an account by clicking the 'Sign up' button on the front page and filling out the registration form with your information.

questions.question: How do I pay to pass through the lock?
questions.answer: You can pay by logging into your account and following the instructions to complete the payment.

questions.question: What do I do if I have problems with the payment?
questions.answer: If you experience problems with the payment, please contact our support team at support@pins.dk.

questions.question: How can I see my payment history?
questions.answer: You can see your payment history by logging into your account and navigating to the 'History' section.

questions.question: How can I change my account information?
questions.answer: You can change your account information by logging into your account and going to the 'Settings' section, where you can update your information.
